Trigger/Action: TRIGGER: Campaign launch OR Post-purchase timing OR Engagement milestone OR Scheduled feedback request
Tool/System: Survey/poll software / Campaign scheduler / Milestone trigger

Trigger/Action: Design poll/assessment with branching logic based on business goals (lead gen, feedback, segmentation)
Tool/System: Typeform / SurveyMonkey / Zigpoll / Google Forms / Jotform / Outgrow

Trigger/Action: Embed poll/assessment in email, landing page, website popup, SMS, or social media
Tool/System: Email platform / Landing page builder / Website popup tool / SMS platform

Trigger/Action: Capture responses in real-time with partial completion tracking for abandoned surveys
Tool/System: Survey tool webhook / Partial response tracking / Auto-save functionality

Trigger/Action: Score responses automatically (quiz results, assessment scores, satisfaction ratings)
Tool/System: Survey logic / Scoring algorithm / AI response analysis

Trigger/Action: Segment respondents based on answers (persona, readiness, satisfaction level, needs)
Tool/System: CRM segmentation rules / Tagging automation / Persona assignment

Trigger/Action: Trigger personalized follow-up based on specific responses and scores
DECISION: High-value response detected (qualified need, purchase intent, complaint)?
Tool/System: Response threshold detection / High-priority flag system

Trigger/Action: IF YES: Alert sales/support team immediately + trigger priority follow-up workflow
Tool/System: CRM task creation / Sales alert / Support ticket generation / Priority queue

Trigger/Action: IF NO: Send automated results/insights to respondent + nurture sequence enrollment
Tool/System: Automated email with results / PDF report generator / Results dashboard

Trigger/Action: Deliver personalized recommendations, content, or offers based on assessment results
Tool/System: Content recommendation engine / Dynamic offer system / Personalization API

Trigger/Action: Sync response data to CRM with tags and segmentation for future personalization
Tool/System: CRM integration (HubSpot, Salesforce) / Custom field mapping / Tag application

Trigger/Action: Analyze aggregate results for trends, common pain points, product-market fit insights
Tool/System: Survey analytics dashboard / Sentiment analysis / Trend detection

Trigger/Action: Generate feedback reports and trigger internal workflows for product/marketing adjustments
Tool/System: Internal reporting / Stakeholder alerts / Product backlog integration / Strategy updates
